Package com.rays.ctl

Class UserCtl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseCtl<UserForm,​UserDTO,​UserServiceInt>
      • com.rays.ctl.UserCtl
  • @RestController
@RequestMapping("User")
public class UserCtl
extends BaseCtl<UserForm,​UserDTO,​UserServiceInt>
    User Controller class for handling User-related APIs. This controller extends BaseCtl to reuse common CRUD operations such as save, get, delete, and search. It also provides APIs for: - Loading role dropdown - Updating user profile - Changing password - Uploading and downloading profile picture URL Mapping: /User
    Author:
    Rishabh Shrivastava

    • Method Detail

      • preload

        @GetMapping("preload")
public ORSResponse preload()
        Loads role list for dropdown.
        Returns:
        ORSResponse containing role list

      • myProfile

        @PostMapping("myProfile")
public ORSResponse myProfile​(@RequestBody @Valid
                             @Valid MyProfileForm form,
                             org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Updates user profile.
        Parameters:
        form - profile form
        bindingResult - validation result
        Returns:
        ORSResponse with status message

      • changePassword

        @PostMapping("changePassword")
public ORSResponse changePassword​(@RequestBody @Valid
                                  @Valid ChangePasswordForm form,
                                  org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Changes user password.
        Parameters:
        form - change password form
        bindingResult - validation result
        Returns:
        ORSResponse with status message

      • uploadPic

        @PostMapping("/profilePic/{userId}")
public ORSResponse uploadPic​(@PathVariable
                             java.lang.Long userId,
                             @RequestParam("file")
                             org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file,
                             javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
        Uploads profile picture.
        Parameters:
        userId - user ID
        file - image file
        req - HTTP request
        Returns:
        ORSResponse with image ID

      • downloadPic

        @GetMapping("/profilePic/{userId}")
public void downloadPic​(@PathVariable
                        java.lang.Long userId,
                        javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
        Downloads profile picture.
        Parameters:
        userId - user ID
        response - HTTP response
